tasks.name: validate-issue
tasks.description: Validate Issue Exists and Is Open

tasks.name: create-branch
tasks.gate: SE-2 (C2): branch is enhance/{issue}-{slug}, not main/master/default

tasks.name: discovery
tasks.gate: SE-4 (C3/F6): discovery.md exists with issue body and answered questions

tasks.name: context-assembly
tasks.gate: SE-5: understanding.md exists with codebase analysis and LTM grounding

tasks.name: approach-design
tasks.gate: SE-6 (C7): approach.yaml exists with technique rationale, tasks, and self-evals

tasks.name: mid-checkpoint
tasks.gate: C9: Gated only if --approve-plan flag set; default OFF

tasks.name: implementation
tasks.gate: SE-8: All approach tasks implemented; code matches task list

tasks.name: judge-rating
tasks.gate: SE-9: confidence.yaml exists with rating, reasoning, and alternative paths

tasks.name: quality-audit
tasks.gate: SE-10: quality-report.yaml exists; all checks PASS or REVIEW with evidence

tasks.name: pr-checkpoint
tasks.gate: SE-11: PR exists, all required checks in PR checklist

tasks.name: finalize
tasks.gate: SE-12: PR merged, branch deleted, evidence committed

notes: Pre-flight validation (steps 1-2) completed. Issue #262 is open. Branch enhance/262-fix-it-lean-rca created from main and pushed to origin. STM directories initialized. Awaiting user Q&A (step 3).
